hero_title: Tap to connect. Launch your business.
hero_sub: NFC keychains and simple, effective websites for small businesses and side hustles. Hand clients a keychain, they tap, you get the lead.

packages.name: Starter (Side Hustle)
bullets: 10 NFC keychains programmed to your link

packages.name: Standard
bullets: 25 NFC keychains • basic SEO • 2 rounds of edits

faq.q: How do the NFC keychains work?
faq.a: Tap with a modern smartphone and it opens your link (website, link‑in‑bio, or social). We program them for you.
We can use free static hosting (Netlify/GitHub Pages) or your preferred platform. Shopify Buy Buttons can be added later.
Starter: ~7 days, Standard: ~10 days, Pro: ~14 days after content intake.
